message: Hello! I'm your BPMN Modeling Agent. I'll analyze the task now and start planning the diagram.
I've analyzed the task and defined 6 goals for the model.
Iteration 1 — setting up participants (pools/lanes) with the retailer as main process owner and the customer as an external participant.

Modeling the full return process inside the Retailer pool (Customer stays collapsed). I'll add start, automation for label generation/sending, event-based wait with 14-day timeout, inspection decision, and refund/confirmation path with proper message flows to the customer.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 11 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 3 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 1/3…

Iteration 1 — applying critical corrections: (1) move work into correct lanes (Warehouse/Accounting), (2) keep Customer collapsed but make messaging consistent, (3) fix 'Return arrived' message-catch by switching it to a non-message trigger that doesn’t require a message flow.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 6 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 2 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 2/3…

Applying the two critical fixes: (1) place TaskForwardAccounting into the Warehouse lane, and (2) make the 'Return arrived' catch event valid by adding an incoming message flow from the Customer pool.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 6 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 1 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 3/3…
Fixing the critical lane containment issue by moving TaskForwardAccounting into the Warehouse lane (all nodes must be inside a lane when lanes exist).
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 4 issue(s) — details below.
Why is the task "Forward info" without task type?

"Forward info" is currently modeled as a generic BPMN "Task" (unspecified type). That’s valid BPMN, but it appears as ‘without task type’ because it isn’t specialized.

If you want a specific type:
- Use "User Task" if a warehouse employee manually forwards the information
- Use "Send Task" if it’s an explicit send/handoff to accounting
- Use "Service Task" if it’s automated by the system

Tell me which applies, and I’ll update the model accordingly.
Add a messageflow to the StartEvent. Move inform rejection and the End Event to the Customer Portal lane.
I'll update the BPMN model to add the requested message flow to the start and move the rejection communication and its end event into the Customer Portal lane.

Iteration 1 — pools/lanes already exist. I will apply the requested modeling changes: add a message flow from Customer to the start event, and move the rejection communication task + rejection end event into the Customer Portal lane while keeping sequence flows intact.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 4 issue(s) — details below.
The Exclusive Gateway is not correct. The label is not good and the sequenceflows needs labels.
I'll correct the exclusive gateway usage, improve its label, and add labels to the outgoing sequence flows so the decision logic is explicit.
I’ll fix the exclusive gateway semantics, improve the gateway label, and add condition labels to its outgoing sequence flows (accept vs reject).
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 3 issue(s) — details below.
